facts: ~450k histopathology patches from 5 hospitals; canonical hospital-shift benchmark in pathology.
hypotheses: Histopathology hospital-shift is modality-specific rather than the same as radiology hospital-shift (NIH↔CheXpert↔PadChest).
Staining variability accounts for most of the shift rather than tissue-population factors contributing comparably.
intuitions: Histopathology foundation-model work 2024-25 and staining-normalization ablations likely exist.
unknowns: Whether 'hospital' denotes institution, scanner, or technician cannot be determined because sub-hospital factors are not exposed.
